text: Sometimes the world whispers in quiet colors, asking nothing but for you to pause. In that stillness, you learn that beauty doesn't need an audience — only attention.
I have walked roads without maps, trusting the pull of somewhere I cannot name. Perhaps we are all guided by little pieces of hope we leave behind unknowingly.
There is a softness in every sunrise, a reminder that even the darkest night signs its name before leaving. And so do we — returning each morning a little more whole.
When the mind grows loud, I sit with my breath like an old friend. It tells me that nothing is permanent — not fear, not doubt, not even the weight I once carried.
Some memories live like lanterns, glowing quietly in the corners of who we are. They do not ask to be remembered, yet they guide us all the same.
The ocean does not fear its own tides. It rises, it falls, and still it remains whole. I try to learn the same rhythm — to let go without losing myself.
Every dream begins as a small spark — fragile, flickering, unsure. But in the heart that chooses to protect it, a spark becomes a fire capable of reshaping worlds.
I write not to be understood, but to understand. In every line I leave a truth I didn't know I held, and in every pause I discover something new about myself.
There are days when courage looks like movement, and days it looks like staying still. Either way, the heart knows the way — if only you listen long enough.
If life is a collection of moments, then may mine be filled with ones that feel like warm light — fleeting yet unforgettable, gentle yet endlessly real.

Ever heard someone say something that completely broke you from the inside but you have to pretend that it didn't affect you? That you were completely fine with it even though it was killing you from the inside? You convince the world that it's okay in the hopes that you'll be able to convince yourself that it is okay… But you know that it isn't and you don't say anything because no one really cares!

title: I Tell You Nothing But All
text:
I tell you nothing but all
I ask you nothing but some
I ask you to write lines
I ask you to accept offer
I ask you to come back
I ask you to meet once again
I ask you to have what we had
Yet you refuse to all
Yet I refuse to stop
I hope that someday you listen
I hope that someday you'll write
I hope that someday you'll accept
I hope that someday you'll come back
I hope that someday we'll once again be us
I hope that you give everything
I ask…

title: To the Girl Opposite to My Window
text:
Everyday I woke up knowing that you were there
Every night I slept seeing the lights off of your room
When I would look outside the window in rain, I would hope that you would come out and I'd see not one but two beautiful things!
But, suddenly today morning I woke up to an emptiness
Unaware what caused it, confusion filled me
I saw outside and there lied the answer
You were no longer there
Sun wasn't bright enough to light the darkness of the void your absence made
No more will I sleep to your lights
I'll wake up knowing that mornings will never be the same again
Oh what I'd do to see the lights glow and see the girl opposite to my window!

Shaam dhalte dhalti nahi
Raatein kat te kat ti nahi
Khushiyaan milte milti nahi
Ummede tut te tut tu nahi
Vo hamari hote hoti nahi

Tum aasmaan ka khula pan ho
Main zameen ki bandhagi
Log kehte hain hum milenge
Lekin main jaanta hun vo aankhon ka dhokha hai
Main phirbhi tumhara vahan par intezaar karunga

And the sun shone again
Into the dark forest
After the eternal wait for solace
Desolation faded
But could this unforeseen ecstasy
be borne by the nocturnals?

Hoth mere hain magar hasi tumhari
Aankh meri hai magar nami tumhari
Mann mera hai magar usme yaadein tumhaari
Dil mera hai lekin usme jagah sirf tumhari hai
Pyaar main paagal to kai hote hain
Lekin main to Pyaar se paagal ho gaya tumhaare

Each petal told me a story of hers
Each leaf an experience of hers
The shades all year round her mood
The spring was good and so was autumn
But this summer alas wasn't fortunate to see her bloom
Petal by petal I lost her and soon thorns became my only comfort

In the alley of three and four we met
She liked the fan at speed five;
I barely pushed two on a hot night
Yet somewhere in the alley between three and four we slept under the stars
She, restless
Me, sleepless
We talked and talked
Till the moon falling short of her beauty
Disappeared into the gentle clouds
And the orange of the morning made her brown eyes glow like they were laden with a river of honey from the heavens

title: I Think
text:
I think of you as the sunlight to my sunflower
I think of you as the rain to my leaf
I think of you the colour to my rainbow
The medicine to my every illness
I think of you as the blood to my heart
I think of you as the incomplete piece that completes me
I think and I think and I think
Oh but what misery do thinkers get…

title: This December I Remember
text:
This December I remember
A graveyard of memories buried all year long
Up and low, here and there I find your grave and across my heart a smile shadowed;
I walk past the yard and find last year's yard full of flowers near your grave
Little by little, far you went, for you found new fields to bloom upon
You and me, we are like this month and the next
A moment away yet an eternity of separation
Heavier than a gun was, me picked a pen
Started writing to find that the pen was heavier still
This December I remember

Inkaar ke darr se Izhaar nahi karta
But I've loved her more than the night has ever loved the stars,
Manifested her to be in every chapter of my life
But I turned the page and gone was she…
I look at her face knowing that it will never smile for me,
It will never wait for me.
To love her, I don't need her…

The first time I loved,
I loved with all my heart
Convincing my mind she's the one she's perfect
But fate made sure she was never mine
Determined this time to let the mind find the one
And now have been spending the years convincing the heart to love her just a little

Seasons passed and I watched two things,
Me loving you and you loving someone else
Love doesn't need to make sense to be beautiful
I met you and I know what love is, I saw you with someone else and I knew what hate is
You make me believe in an afterlife cause then I can hope once again to be with you.

I love you the way the leaves love the ground during autumn,
Ready to wither and abandon their existence and perhaps even perish so as to just feel you one last time
I waved you goodbye and the rains poured as if the sky felt my heart and the clouds did what my eyes couldn't.

O conqueror, Never sleep till the world is conquered
The world you say, is not the one made of bricks and mortar
The world is built by your own demons cemented with your fear
Conquer it and you shall deserve a night's sleep
O conqueror, conquer the world

You and me, we're endgame.
We could have been together the past year or the one after that or maybe will be this year.
This year or the next one or the one after that
This lifetime or the next
I don't know when or how, all I know is that when eternity breathes its last and the last ray of light shimmers, you and I will be there holding hands.

With the ink of time
Let me write your name on the fabric of space
For the eternity to know what always was and what always will be
But what never could be…

Every Poem I read
Every Poem I write
Every Song I listen
Every Dream I dream
It's all you
It has always been you
From the moment I first saw you smile a million things might've changed but one fact that has been irrefutable from then and will be so forever is that I am incredibly hopelessly in love with you.

The day you wear a white dress
My eyes will wear tears
Either as your soon to be better half at the thought of being the luckiest man in the world
Or at the thought of you forever being ripped apart from my life

If luck chooses me, I will wake up the next morning next to you
And if not then I will rampage until everything in the world that you do not care about is horrifically destroyed

Many a men would have said you look like the Moon, I am not one of them,
Don't get me wrong, you are as beautiful as the Moon if not a million times more!
But I want to tell you who I am, I am the Sky who will be here to support you and be with you and wait for you every night be it at Full Moon when you are the most beautiful, at No Moon when you're absent and all the phases and changes of yours!

We used to plan our life together
And now the only place we are next to each other is in our common friend's DM

She read my lines and praised them,
As though the moon thanked the artist for capturing her beautiful glow.

The moon always thanked the dark for making it shine brighter
The Sun, existence unknown to the Moon, could do nothing but just smile looking at her shine!

What is it like to lose you? Ask me
What is it like to have you? Ask my existence
